label: Biblical Book
description: A canonical book node within the GCB ecosystem.

label: Biblical Character
description: A named biblical person or collective figure.

label: Biblical Event
description: A major event in the biblical narrative.

label: Theological Theme
description: A recurring theological or doctrinal theme.

label: Doctrine Node
description: A doctrinal framework element in the GCB system.

label: Canonical Group
description: A canonical grouping such as Torah, Prophets, or New Testament.

label: Ethiopian Distinct Book
description: A canonical book preserved distinctly in the Ethiopian tradition.
